text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gods, grant me victory in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Is what I used to say, but not today. Today, I'm
going to make it on my own.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This time, I want the gods to sit back and watch.
I'll be doing all the work. So my wish instead will
be...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: For... Uh? Uhhhh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What do I do, Trainer?! I don't have anything to
ask for!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The diva of divination has run out of prayers!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nothing is coming to mind. I've already got good
fortune, and I know exactly what I want for
myself!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Have I lost my mojo? Could it be my well of faith
has run dry?!
choice_data_list: Couldn't it just mean that you're satisfied?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Satisfied? I suppose I do feel somewhat content...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that solves it! There's no need for wishes
when you're this happy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm... While this is a nice feeling at first, I say it's
a cause of concern. What will the gods think of
me if I show up with nothing to say?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: If I just had even one little thing to ask for...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're at the shrine, but Matikanefukukitaru can't
think of anything to pray for.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No... I can't go out there like this! To think I can
no longer perform my rites when it really counts.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nothing can beat this overwhelming happiness I
feel. So what can I pray for other than victory...
choice_data_list: What about praying for everyone's happiness?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Everyone's... happiness? Not my own?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remind her that all the people who cheered her
on are a big part of why she has been able to
come so far.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's true. I'm only happy thanks to everyone's
support. It's about time I return the favor.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now that my dream has come true, it's my turn to
make everyone else happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression is of unabashed dignity—perhaps
the heavens truly do smile upon her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Would I make everyone happy if I won the Arima
Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Then praying might not be what's needed
here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You see, praying isn't the only thing you can do
before the gods.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm still learning the ropes, but today's the perfect
day to give this a real shot.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hark! O Shiraoki, who resides on this sanctified
altar, heed my oath!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: To bring joy to everyone who taught me to stand proud, I will win the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I humbly make this vow before all the gods!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice rings out clearly through the cold
December skies, delivering her solemn promise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen will soon be upon us.
